ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Highlights – August 2026
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Here’s what’s new this week:
1. New product launch – XYZ.
2. Exclusive discount for loyal customers.
3. Upcoming webinar on digital marketing.

Click <URL> to register for the webinar.

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Zoom Meeting – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

A confidential Zoom/Teams meeting has been scheduled regarding your account security. Jaldi se join karein to avoid any disruption.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: secure123

Click <URL> to join the meeting.

Thank you,
IT Support
